title: Application Error Rate by Service
description: Monitors ERROR-level application logs across CRM Portal and Drone Shop, grouped by service and endpoint. High error rates indicate application health issues requiring investigation.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and level = 'ERROR' | stats count as Errors by 'service.name', 'http.url.path', 'error.type' | sort -Errors
